---
title: "Definitions"
---

## Cube in a Box

«Simple way to run an Open Data Cube»

<https://github.com/opendatacube/cube-in-a-box>

## Open data cube (ODC)

"free, open-source software package that simplifies the management and analysis of large amounts of satellite imagery and other Earth observation data"

"allows users to easily access, process, and analyze decades of geographical data to track changes on Earth's surface over time"

[https://www.opendatacube.org](https://www.opendatacube.org/)
